text.fr: Cette attaque inflige 60 dégâts à l'un des Pokémon de Banc de votre adversaire. (N'appliquez ni la Faiblesse ni la Résistance aux Pokémon de Banc.)
text.en: This attack does 60 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavor_text.en: At a distance, it launches its sharp feathers while flying about. If the enemy gets too close, Rowlet switches tactics and delivers vicious kicks.
It throws one knifelike feather after another at its enemies, and each one precisely strikes a weak point. These feathers are known as blade quills.

text.fr: Cette attaque inflige aussi 20 dégâts à 2 des Pokémon de Banc de votre adversaire. (N'appliquez ni la Faiblesse ni la Résistance aux Pokémon de Banc.)
text.en: This attack also does 20 damage to 2 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavor_text.en: As if wielding a bow, it launches the arrow quills hidden among the feathers of its wings. Decidueye's shots never miss.

text.fr: Lancez 3 pièces. Cette attaque inflige 10 dégâts pour chaque côté face.
text.en: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 10 damage for each heads.

flavor_text.en: When it uses its special stick to strike up a beat, the sound waves produced carry revitalizing energy to the plants and flowers in the area.
The faster a Thwackey can beat out a rhythm with its two sticks, the more respect it wins from its peers.
By drumming, it taps into the power of its special tree stump. The roots of the stump follow its direction in battle.
Often found in gardens, this Pokémon has hairs on its body that it uses to assess its surroundings.

text.fr: Pendant le prochain tour de votre adversaire, ce Pokémon subit 40 dégâts de moins provenant des attaques (après application de la Faiblesse et de la Résistance).
text.en: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes 40 less damage from attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

flavor_text.en: As it grows inside its shell, it uses its psychic abilities to monitor the outside world and prepare for evolution.

text.fr: Cette attaque inflige 30 dégâts supplémentaires pour chaque Énergie Psychic attachée à ce Pokémon.
text.en: This attack does 30 more damage for each Psychic Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavor_text.en: It emits psychic energy to observe and study what's around it—and what's around it can include things over six miles away.

text.fr: Cherchez dans votre deck jusqu'à 3 Pokémon de base, puis placez-les sur votre Banc. Mélangez ensuite votre deck.
text.en: Search your deck for up to 3 Basic Pokémon and put them onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck.

flavor_text.en: It whirls around in the wind while singing a joyous song. This delightful display has charmed many into raising this Pokémon.

text.fr: Cherchez dans votre deck jusqu'à 3 cartes Énergie Grass, puis attachez-les à vos Pokémon de Banc comme il vous plaît. Mélangez ensuite votre deck.
text.en: Search your deck for up to 3 Grass Energy cards and attach them to your Benched Pokémon in any way you like. Then, shuffle your deck.

flavor_text.en: The cotton on the head of this Pokémon can be spun into a glossy, gorgeous yarn—a Galar regional specialty.

text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c'est face, pendant le prochain tour de votre adversaire, évitez tous les dégâts infligés à ce Pokémon par des attaques.
text.en: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks.

flavor_text.en: It spends its entire life inside an apple. It hides from its natural enemies, bird Pokémon, by pretending it's just an apple and nothing more.

text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c'est face, défaussez une Énergie du Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire.
text.en: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text.en: It ate a sour apple, and that induced its evolution. In its cheeks, it stores an acid capable of causing chemical burns.
Eating a sweet apple caused its evolution. A nectarous scent wafts from its body, luring in the bug Pokémon it preys on.

text.fr: Défaussez une Énergie de ce Pokémon.
text.en: Discard an Energy from this Pokémon.

flavor_text.en: It has special pads on the backs of its feet, and one on its nose. Once it's raring to fight, these pads radiate tremendous heat.

text.fr: Cherchez dans votre deck une carte Énergie Fire, puis attachez-la à ce Pokémon. Mélangez ensuite votre deck.
text.en: Search your deck for a Fire Energy card and attach it to this Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck.

flavor_text.en: It kicks berries right off the branches of trees and then juggles them with its feet, practicing its footwork.

text.fr: Défaussez 2 Énergies de ce Pokémon.
text.en: Discard 2 Energy from this Pokémon.

flavor_text.en: It's skilled at both offense and defense, and it gets pumped up when cheered on. But if it starts showboating, it could put itself in a tough spot.
It stores flammable gas in its body and uses it to generate heat. The yellow sections on its belly get particularly hot.

text.fr: Pour chaque Énergie Fire attachée à ce Pokémon, défaussez la carte du dessus du deck de votre adversaire.
text.en: For each Fire Energy attached to this Pokémon, discard the top card of your opponent's deck.

text.fr: Le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire est maintenant Brûlé.
text.en: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned.

flavor_text.en: When it heats up, its body temperature reaches about 1,500 degrees Fahrenheit. It lashes its body like a whip and launches itself at enemies.

text.fr: Pendant le prochain tour de votre adversaire, ce Pokémon subit 30 dégâts de moins provenant des attaques (après application de la Faiblesse et de la Résistance).
text.en: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes 30 less damage from attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

flavor_text.en: Its talent is tap-dancing. It can also manipulate temperatures to create a floor of ice, which this Pokémon can kick up to use as a barrier.

text.fr: Cette attaque inflige 20 dégâts pour chaque Pokémon dans votre pile de défausse qui a l'attaque Folle Aventure.
text.en: This attack does 20 damage for each Pokémon in your discard pile that has the Mad Party attack.

flavor_text.en: It's highly skilled at tap-dancing. It waves its cane of ice in time with its graceful movements.

text.fr: Ajoutez à votre main 2 Énergies Water attachées à ce Pokémon.
text.en: Put 2 Water Energy attached to this Pokémon into your hand.

flavor_text.en: Said to be the embodiment of north winds, it can instantly purify filthy, murky water.

text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c'est face, le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire est maintenant Paralysé.
text.en: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavor_text.en: It lived in snowy areas for so long that its fire sac cooled off and atrophied. It now has an organ that generates cold instead.

text.fr: Cette attaque inflige aussi 10 dégâts à chacun des Pokémon de Banc de votre adversaire. (N'appliquez ni la Faiblesse ni la Résistance aux Pokémon de Banc.)
text.en: This attack also does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

text.fr: Pendant votre prochain tour, ce Pokémon ne peut pas utiliser Coup d'Boule Écrasant.
text.en: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't use Crushing Headbutt.

flavor_text.en: On days when blizzards blow through, it comes down to where people live. It stashes food in the snowball on its head, taking it home for later.
When scared, this Pokémon cries. Its tears pack the chemical punch of 100 onions, and attackers won't be able to resist weeping.
A clever combatant, this Pokémon battles using water balloons created with moisture secreted from its palms.

text.fr: Cette attaque inflige aussi 20 dégâts à l'un des Pokémon de Banc de votre adversaire. (N'appliquez ni la Faiblesse ni la Résistance aux Pokémon de Banc.)
text.en: This attack also does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavor_text.en: It has many hidden capabilities, such as fingertips that can shoot water and a membrane on its back that it can use to glide through the air.
It starts off battles by attacking with its rock-hard horn, but as soon as the opponent flinches, this Pokémon bites down and never lets go.

text.fr: Cette attaque inflige 30 dégâts supplémentaires pour chaque Colorless dans le Coût de Retraite du Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire.
text.en: This attack does 30 more damage for each Colorless in your opponent's Active Pokémon's Retreat Cost.

text.fr: Pendant le prochain tour de votre adversaire, le Pokémon Défenseur ne peut pas battre en retraite.
text.en: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.

flavor_text.en: This Pokémon rapidly extends its retractable neck to sink its sharp fangs into distant enemies and take them down.

text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c'est face, pendant le prochain tour de votre adversaire, évitez tous les effets d'attaques, y compris les dégâts, infligés à ce Pokémon.
text.en: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to this Pokémon.

text.fr: Cette attaque inflige 20 dégâts supplémentaires pour chaque Énergie Water attachée à ce Pokémon.
text.en: This attack does 20 more damage for each Water Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavor_text.en: It's so strong that it can knock out some opponents in a single hit, but it also may forget what it's battling midfight.
If it sees any movement around it, this Pokémon charges for it straightaway, leading with its sharply pointed jaw. It's very proud of that jaw.

text.fr: Défaussez 2 cartes Énergie Water de votre main. Sinon, cette attaque ne fait rien.
text.en: Discard 2 Water Energy cards from your hand. If you don't, this attack does nothing.

flavor_text.en: This Pokémon has a jaw that's as sharp as a spear and as strong as steel. Apparently Barraskewda's flesh is surprisingly tasty, too.

text.fr: Cherchez dans votre deck un Pokémon de base, puis placez-le sur votre Banc. Mélangez ensuite votre deck.
text.en: Search your deck for a Basic Pokémon and put it onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck.

flavor_text.en: It spits out thread imbued with a frigid sort of energy and uses it to tie its body to branches, disguising itself as an icicle while it sleeps.
It shows no mercy to any who desecrate fields and mountains. It will fly around on its icy wings, causing a blizzard to chase offenders away.

text.fr: Cette attaque inflige aussi 10 dégâts à chacun des Pokémon de Banc de votre adversaire. (N'appliquez ni la Faiblesse ni la Résistance aux Pokémon de Banc.)
text.en: This attack also does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavor_text.en: It drifted in on the flow of ocean waters from a frigid place. It keeps its head iced constantly to make sure it stays nice and cold.
Powerful legs and jaws made it the apex predator of its time. Its own overhunting of its prey was what drove it to extinction.

text.fr: Pendant le prochain tour de votre adversaire, ce Pokémon subit 60 dégâts de moins provenant des attaques (après application de la Faiblesse et de la Résistance).
text.en: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes 60 less damage from attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

text.fr: Le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire est maintenant Endormi.
text.en: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

flavor_text.en: Though it's able to capture prey by freezing its surroundings, it has trouble eating the prey afterward because its mouth is on top of its head.

text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c'est face, le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire est maintenant Paralysé.
text.en: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavor_text.en: One boy's invention led to the development of many different machines that take advantage of Rotom's unique capabilities.

text.fr: Votre adversaire échange son Pokémon Actif contre l'un de ses Pokémon de Banc.
text.en: Your opponent switches their Active Pokémon with 1 of their Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text.en: This Pokémon is very popular as a herding dog in the Galar region. As it runs, it generates electricity from the base of its tail.

text.fr: Pendant le prochain tour de votre adversaire, le Pokémon Défenseur ne peut pas battre en retraite.
text.en: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.

text.fr: Si le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire est un Pokémon-V ou un Pokémon-GX, cette attaque inflige 90 dégâts supplémentaires.
text.en: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Pokémon V or Pokémon-GX, this attack does 90 more damage.

flavor_text.en: This Pokémon generates electricity and channels it into its legs to keep them going strong. Boltund can run nonstop for three full days.
It stores poison in an internal poison sac and secretes that poison through its skin. If you touch this Pokémon, a tingling sensation follows.

text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c'est face, défaussez les 5 cartes du dessus du deck de votre adversaire. Si c'est pile, défaussez les 5 cartes du dessus de votre deck.
text.en: Flip a coin. If heads, discard the top 5 cards of your opponent's deck. If tails, discard the top 5 cards of your deck.

text.fr: Ce Pokémon s'inflige aussi 30 dégâts.
text.en: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.

flavor_text.en: When this Pokémon sounds as if it's strumming a guitar, it's actually clawing at the protrusions on its chest to generate electricity.

text.fr: Lancez 4 pièces. Cette attaque inflige 30 dégâts pour chaque côté face. Si vous obtenez au moins 2 côtés face, le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire est maintenant Paralysé.
text.en: Flip 4 coins. This attack does 30 damage for each heads. If at least 2 of them are heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavor_text.en: It feeds on seaweed, using its teeth to scrape it off rocks. Electric current flows from the tips of its spines.

text.fr: Choisissez l'une des attaques du Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire. Pendant le prochain tour de votre adversaire, ce Pokémon-là ne peut pas utiliser cette attaque.
text.en: Choose 1 of your opponent's Active Pokémon's attacks. During your opponent's next turn, that Pokémon can't use that attack.

text.fr: Cette attaque inflige aussi 20 dégâts à l'un des Pokémon de Banc de votre adversaire. (N'appliquez ni la Faiblesse ni la Résistance aux Pokémon de Banc.)
text.en: This attack also does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavor_text.en: As it eats the seeds stored up in its pocket-like pouches, this Pokémon is not just satisfying its constant hunger. It's also generating electricity.

text.fr: Pendant votre prochain tour, l'attaque Amplificateur de ce Pokémon inflige 90 dégâts supplémentaires (avant application de la Faiblesse et de la Résistance).
text.en: During your next turn, this Pokémon's Amping Up attack does 90 more damage (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

text.fr: Pendant votre prochain tour, ce Pokémon ne peut pas attaquer.
text.en: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

flavor_text.en: In ancient times, it was unbeatable thanks to its powerful lower body, but it went extinct anyway after it depleted all its plant-based food sources.
The shaking of its freezing upper half is what generates its electricity. It has a hard time walking around.

text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c'est face, le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire est maintenant Paralysé.
text.en: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavor_text.en: This Pokémon will look into your eyes and read the contents of your heart. If it finds evil there, it promptly hides away.

text.fr: Cette attaque inflige 30 dégâts supplémentaires pour chaque Énergie attachée au Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire.
text.en: This attack does 30 more damage for each Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text.en: Brave and prideful, this Pokémon dashes airily through the forest, its steps aided by the psychic power stored in the fur on its fetlocks.

text.fr: Placez 3 marqueurs de dégâts sur les Pokémon de votre adversaire comme il vous plaît.
text.en: Put 3 damage counters on your opponent's Pokémon in any way you like.

flavor_text.en: Watch your step when wandering areas oceans once covered. What looks like a stone could be this Pokémon, and it will curse you if you kick it.

text.fr: Pendant le prochain tour de votre adversaire, le Pokémon Défenseur ne peut pas battre en retraite.
text.en: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.

flavor_text.en: Its shell is overflowing with its heightened otherworldly energy. The ectoplasm serves as protection for this Pokémon's core spirit.

text.fr: Cette attaque inflige 20 dégâts pour chaque Pokémon dans votre pile de défausse qui a l'attaque Folle Aventure.
text.en: This attack does 20 damage for each Pokémon in your discard pile that has the Mad Party attack.

flavor_text.en: Its upper whiskers are sensors that survey its surroundings. Its lower whiskers are organs that shoot electricity.

text.fr: Placez 2 marqueurs de dégâts sur le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire.
text.en: Put 2 damage counters on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text.en: This Pokémon is said to have been born when a lonely spirit possessed a cold, leftover cup of tea.

text.fr: Cette attaque inflige 20 dégâts pour chaque Pokémon dans votre pile de défausse qui a l'attaque Folle Aventure.
text.en: This attack does 20 damage for each Pokémon in your discard pile that has the Mad Party attack.

flavor_text.en: This species lives in antique teapots. Most pots are forgeries, but on rare occasions, an authentic work is found.

text.fr: Cherchez dans votre deck un Pokémon, montrez-le, puis ajoutez-le à votre main. Mélangez ensuite votre deck.
text.en: Search your deck for a Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

flavor_text.en: Via the protrusion on its head, it senses other creatures' emotions. If you don't have a calm disposition, it will never warm up to you.

text.fr: Soignez 30 dégâts de ce Pokémon.
text.en: Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.

text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c'est face, cette attaque inflige 30 dégâts supplémentaires.
text.en: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavor_text.en: No matter who you are, if you bring strong emotions near this Pokémon, it will silence you violently.

text.fr: Placez un marqueur de dégâts sur le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire pour chaque Pokémon dans votre pile de défausse.
text.en: Put 1 damage counter on your opponent's Active Pokémon for each Pokémon in your discard pile.

flavor_text.en: It emits psychic power strong enough to cause headaches as a deterrent to the approach of others.

text.fr: Soignez 10 dégâts de chacun de vos Pokémon.
text.en: Heal 10 damage from each of your Pokémon.

flavor_text.en: This Pokémon was born from sweet-smelling particles in the air. Its body is made of cream.

text.fr: Attachez le nombre de cartes Énergie de base voulues de votre main à vos Pokémon comme il vous plaît.
text.en: Attach any number of basic Energy cards from your hand to your Pokémon in any way you like.

text.fr: Soignez 30 dégâts de ce Pokémon.
text.en: Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.

flavor_text.en: When it trusts a Trainer, it will treat them to berries it's decorated with cream.

text.fr: Soignez 30 dégâts de chacun de vos Pokémon.
text.en: Heal 30 damage from each of your Pokémon.

text.fr: Le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire est maintenant Confus.
text.en: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

flavor_text.en: These intelligent Pokémon touch horns with each other to share information between them.

text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c'est face, cette attaque inflige 10 dégâts supplémentaires.
text.en: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 more damage.

flavor_text.en: After being reborn as a ghost Pokémon, Dreepy wanders the areas it used to inhabit back when it was alive in prehistoric seas.

text.fr: Cherchez un Fantyrm dans votre deck, puis placez-le sur votre Banc. Mélangez ensuite votre deck.
text.en: Search your deck for a Dreepy and put it onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck.

flavor_text.en: It's capable of flying faster than 120 mph. It battles alongside Dreepy and dotes on them until they successfully evolve.

text.fr: Placez 3 marqueurs de dégâts sur les Pokémon de Banc de votre adversaire comme il vous plaît.
text.en: Put 3 damage counters on your opponent's Benched Pokémon in any way you like.

flavor_text.en: When it isn't battling, it keeps Dreepy in the holes on its horns. Once a fight starts, it launches the Dreepy like supersonic missiles.

text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c'est face, cette attaque inflige 30 dégâts supplémentaires.
text.en: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavor_text.en: The Farfetch'd of the Galar region are brave warriors, and they wield thick, tough leeks in battle.

text.fr: Ce Pokémon ne peut pas réutiliser Joute Astrale tant qu'il ne quitte pas le Poste Actif.
text.en: This Pokémon can't use Meteor Assault again until it leaves the Active Spot.

flavor_text.en: Only Farfetch'd that have survived many battles can attain this evolution. When this Pokémon's leek withers, it will retire from combat.

text.fr: Ce Pokémon s'inflige aussi 30 dégâts.
text.en: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.

flavor_text.en: A clay slab with cursed engravings took possession of a Yamask. The slab is said to be absorbing the Yamask's dark power.

text.fr: Pour chaque marqueur de dégâts sur ce Tutétékri de Galar, placez 2 marqueurs de dégâts sur les Pokémon de votre adversaire comme il vous plaît.
text.en: For each damage counter on this Galarian Runerigus, put 2 damage counters on your opponent's Pokémon in any way you like.

text.fr: Ce Pokémon s'inflige aussi 30 dégâts.
text.en: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.

flavor_text.en: A powerful curse was woven into an ancient painting. After absorbing the spirit of a Yamask, the painting began to move.
Most of its body has the same composition as coal. Fittingly, this Pokémon was first discovered in coal mines about 400 years ago.
It forms coal inside its body. Coal dropped by this Pokémon once helped fuel the lives of people in the Galar region.
It's usually peaceful, but the vandalism of mines enrages it. Offenders will be incinerated with flames that reach 2,700 degrees Fahrenheit.

text.fr: Pendant le prochain tour de votre adversaire, si le Pokémon Défenseur essaie d'attaquer, votre adversaire lance une pièce. Si c'est pile, l'attaque n'est pas lancée.
text.en: During your opponent's next turn, if the Defending Pokémon tries to attack, your opponent flips a coin. If tails, that attack doesn't happen.

flavor_text.en: It spews sand from its nostrils. While the enemy is blinded, it burrows into the ground to hide.

text.fr: Pendant votre prochain tour, les attaques de ce Pokémon infligent 120 dégâts supplémentaires au Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire (avant application de la Faiblesse et de la Résistance).
text.en: During your next turn, this Pokémon's attacks do 120 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

flavor_text.en: Its unique style of coiling allows it to blast sand out of its sand sac more efficiently.

text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c'est face, le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire est maintenant Paralysé.
text.en: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavor_text.en: It's very curious, but its means of investigating things is to try to punch them with its tentacles. The search for food is what brings it onto land.

text.fr: Tant que ce Krakos est sur le Poste Actif, les attaques du Pokémon Défenseur coûtent ColorlessColorless de plus, et le Pokémon Défenseur ne peut pas battre en retraite. Cet effet n'est applicable qu'une fois.
text.en: Until this Grapploct leaves the Active Spot, the Defending Pokémon's attacks cost ColorlessColorless more, and the Defending Pokémon can't retreat. This effect can't be applied more than once.

text.fr: Les dégâts de cette attaque ne sont pas affectés par la Résistance.
text.en: This attack's damage isn't affected by Resistance.

flavor_text.en: A body made up of nothing but muscle makes the grappling moves this Pokémon performs with its tentacles tremendously powerful.

text.fr: Cherchez jusqu'à 2 Pokémon de base dans votre deck et placez-les sur votre Banc. Mélangez ensuite votre deck.
text.en: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Pokémon and put them onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck.

text.fr: Cette attaque inflige 30 dégâts pour chacun de vos Pokémon de Banc ayant « Hexadron » dans son nom.
text.en: This attack does 30 damage for each of your Benched Pokémon that has "Falinks" in its name.

flavor_text.en: Five of them are troopers, and one is the brass. The brass's orders are absolute.

text.fr: Si au moins une Énergie supplémentaire est attachée à ce Pokémon (en plus du coût de cette attaque), cette attaque inflige 60 dégâts supplémentaires.
text.en: If this Pokémon has at least 1 extra Energy attached (in addition to this attack's cost), this attack does 60 more damage.

flavor_text.en: It stands in grasslands, watching the sun's descent from zenith to horizon. This Pokémon has a talent for delivering dynamic kicks.

text.fr: Cherchez dans votre deck une carte Évolution de ce Pokémon, puis placez-la sur ce Pokémon pour le faire évoluer. Mélangez ensuite votre deck.
text.en: Search your deck for a card that evolves from this Pokémon and put it onto this Pokémon to evolve it. Then, shuffle your deck.

flavor_text.en: Its body is full of poisonous gas. It floats into garbage dumps, seeking out the fumes of raw, rotting trash.

text.fr: Le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire est maintenant Empoisonné. Placez 4 marqueurs de dégâts au lieu d'un sur ce Pokémon-là pendant le Contrôle Pokémon.
text.en: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned. Put 4 damage counters instead of 1 on that Pokémon during Pokémon Checkup.

flavor_text.en: This Pokémon consumes particles that contaminate the air. Instead of leaving droppings, it expels clean air.

text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c'est pile, cette attaque ne fait rien.
text.en: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavor_text.en: Thought to be the oldest form of Zigzagoon, it moves in zigzags and wreaks havoc upon its surroundings.

text.fr: Échangez ce Pokémon contre l'un de vos Pokémon de Banc.
text.en: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text.en: This very aggressive Pokémon will recklessly challenge opponents stronger than itself.

text.fr: Pendant le prochain tour de votre adversaire, évitez tous les dégâts infligés à ce Pokémon par des attaques de Pokémon de base.
text.en: During your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks from Basic Pokémon.

flavor_text.en: It evolved after experiencing numerous fights. While crossing its arms, it lets out a shout that would make any opponent flinch.

text.fr: Votre adversaire mélange sa main, puis la place en dessous de son deck. S'il place ainsi au moins une carte en dessous de son deck, il pioche 3 cartes.
text.en: Your opponent shuffles their hand and puts it on the bottom of their deck. If they put any cards on the bottom of their deck in this way, they draw 3 cards.

flavor_text.en: Aided by the soft pads on its feet, it silently raids the food stores of other Pokémon. It survives off its ill-gotten gains.

text.fr: Votre adversaire dévoile sa main. Choisissez-y une carte, puis placez-la en dessous de son deck.
text.en: Your opponent reveals their hand. Choose a card you find there and put it on the bottom of their deck.

flavor_text.en: It secretly marks potential targets with a scent. By following the scent, it stalks its targets and steals from them when they least expect it.
Through its nose, it sucks in the emanations produced by people and Pokémon when they feel annoyed. It thrives off this negative energy.

text.fr: Les dégâts de cette attaque ne sont affectés par aucun effet en action sur le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire.
text.en: This attack's damage isn't affected by any effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text.en: When it gets down on all fours as if to beg for forgiveness, it's trying to lure opponents in so that it can stab them with its spear-like hair.

text.fr: Cette attaque inflige 30 dégâts supplémentaires pour chaque Énergie attachée au Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire.
text.en: This attack does 30 more damage for each Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text.en: With the hair wrapped around its body helping to enhance its muscles, this Pokémon can overwhelm even Machamp.
Living with a savage, seafaring people has toughened this Pokémon's body so much that parts of it have turned to iron.
What appears to be an iron helmet is actually hardened hair. This Pokémon lives for the thrill of battle.

text.fr: Lancez une pièce jusqu'à obtenir un côté pile. Cette attaque inflige 30 dégâts supplémentaires pour chaque côté face.
text.en: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 30 more damage for each heads.

flavor_text.en: Living in mud with a high iron content has given it a strong steel body.

text.fr: Vous pouvez défausser 2 Énergies attachées à ce Pokémon. Dans ce cas, pendant le prochain tour de votre adversaire, ce Pokémon subit 100 dégâts de moins provenant des attaques (après application de la Faiblesse et de la Résistance).
text.en: You may discard 2 Energy from this Pokémon. If you do, during your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes 100 less damage from attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

flavor_text.en: This Pokémon reigns supreme in the skies of the Galar region. The black luster of its steel body could drive terror into the heart of any foe.
It digs up the ground with its trunk. It's also very strong, being able to carry loads of over five tons without any problem at all.

text.fr: Si des marqueurs de dégâts sont placés sur vos Pokémon de Banc, cette attaque inflige 120 dégâts supplémentaires.
text.en: If your Benched Pokémon have any damage counters on them, this attack does 120 more damage.

flavor_text.en: They came over from another region long ago and worked together with humans. Their green skin is resistant to water.

text.fr: Attachez une carte Énergie Metal de votre pile de défausse à l'un de vos Pokémon.
text.en: Attach a Metal Energy card from your discard pile to 1 of your Pokémon.

flavor_text.en: Its body resembles polished metal, and it's both lightweight and strong. The only drawback is that it rusts easily.

text.fr: Regardez la carte du dessus du deck de votre adversaire.
text.en: Look at the top card of your opponent's deck.

text.fr: Lancez 2 pièces. Cette attaque inflige 20 dégâts pour chaque côté face.
text.en: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage for each heads.

flavor_text.en: The way it brushes away grime with its tail can be helpful when cleaning. But its focus on spotlessness can make cleaning more of a hassle.

text.fr: Attachez une carte Énergie de base de votre pile de défausse à l'un de vos Pokémon de Banc.
text.en: Attach a basic Energy card from your discard pile to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text.en: Its body secretes oil that this Pokémon spreads over its nest as a coating to protect it from dust. Cinccino won't tolerate even a speck of the stuff.
They are better at swimming than flying, and they happily eat their favorite food, peat moss, as they dive underwater.

text.fr: Vous pouvez défausser une carte de votre main. Dans ce cas, cette attaque inflige 70 dégâts supplémentaires.
text.en: You may discard a card from your hand. If you do, this attack does 70 more damage.

flavor_text.en: Swanna start to dance at dusk. The one dancing in the middle is the leader of the flock.

text.fr: Cette attaque inflige 20 dégâts pour chaque Pokémon dans votre pile de défausse qui a l'attaque Folle Aventure.
text.en: This attack does 20 damage for each Pokémon in your discard pile that has the Mad Party attack.

flavor_text.en: It excels at digging holes. Using its ears, it can dig a nest 33 feet deep in one night.
It knows the forest inside and out. If it comes across a wounded Pokémon, Oranguru will gather medicinal herbs to treat it.
Found throughout the Galar region, this Pokémon becomes uneasy if its cheeks are ever completely empty of berries.
It stashes berries in its tail—so many berries that they fall out constantly. But this Pokémon is a bit slow-witted, so it doesn't notice the loss.
It will bravely challenge any opponent, no matter how powerful. This Pokémon benefits from every battle—even a defeat increases its strength a bit.

text.fr: Avant d'infliger des dégâts, défaussez tous les Outils Pokémon du Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire.
text.en: Before doing damage, discard all Pokémon Tools from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text.en: Smart enough to use tools in battle, these Pokémon have been seen picking up rocks and flinging them or using ropes to wrap up enemies.

text.fr: Pendant le prochain tour de votre adversaire, ce Pokémon subit 10 dégâts de moins provenant des attaques (après application de la Faiblesse et de la Résistance).
text.en: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes 10 less damage from attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

flavor_text.en: If its fleece grows too long, Wooloo won't be able to move. Cloth made with the wool of this Pokémon is surprisingly strong.

text.fr: Pendant le prochain tour de votre adversaire, ce Pokémon subit 30 dégâts de moins provenant des attaques (après application de la Faiblesse et de la Résistance).
text.en: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes 30 less damage from attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

text.fr: Ce Pokémon s'inflige aussi 30 dégâts.
text.en: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.

flavor_text.en: Its majestic horns are meant only to impress the opposite gender. They never see use in battle.

text.fr: Cherchez dans votre deck jusqu'à 2 Pokémon Grass de base, puis placez-les sur votre Banc. Mélangez ensuite votre deck.
text.en: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Grass Pokémon and put them onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck.

text.fr: Ce Pokémon s'inflige aussi 30 dégâts.
text.en: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.

text.fr: Vous pouvez défausser jusqu'à 3 Énergies Grass de ce Pokémon. Dans ce cas, cette attaque inflige 50 dégâts supplémentaires pour chaque carte défaussée de cette façon.
text.en: You may discard up to 3 Grass Energy from this Pokémon. If you do, this attack does 50 more damage for each card you discarded in this way.

text.fr: Défaussez 2 Énergies de ce Pokémon.
text.en: Discard 2 Energy from this Pokémon.

text.fr: Vous pouvez défausser une Énergie de ce Pokémon. Dans ce cas, défaussez une Énergie du Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire.
text.en: You may discard an Energy from this Pokémon. If you do, discard an Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

text.fr: Cette attaque inflige 40 dégâts supplémentaires pour chaque Énergie Fire attachée à ce Pokémon. Si vous avez infligé des dégâts avec cette attaque, vous pouvez attacher une carte Énergie Fire de votre pile de défausse à ce Pokémon.
text.en: This attack does 40 more damage for each Fire Energy attached to this Pokémon. If you did any damage with this attack, you may attach a Fire Energy card from your discard pile to this Pokémon.

text.fr: Attachez une carte Énergie Water de votre main à ce Pokémon. Dans ce cas, échangez-le contre l'un de vos Pokémon de Banc.
text.en: Attach a Water Energy card from your hand to this Pokémon. If you do, switch it with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

text.fr: Ajoutez à votre main 2 Énergies Water attachées à ce Pokémon.
text.en: Put 2 Water Energy attached to this Pokémon into your hand.

text.fr: Cette attaque inflige 30 dégâts supplémentaires pour chaque Énergie Water attachée à ce Pokémon.
text.en: This attack does 30 more damage for each Water Energy attached to this Pokémon.

text.fr: Le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire est maintenant Empoisonné.
text.en: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

text.fr: Si le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire est Empoisonné, cette attaque inflige 90 dégâts supplémentaires.
text.en: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is Poisoned, this attack does 90 more damage.

text.fr: Si le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire est Empoisonné, cette attaque inflige 80 dégâts supplémentaires.
text.en: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is Poisoned, this attack does 80 more damage.

text.fr: Cette attaque inflige 60 dégâts supplémentaires pour chaque Énergie attachée au Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire.
text.en: This attack does 60 more damage for each Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

text.fr: Pendant votre prochain tour, ce Pokémon ne peut pas attaquer.
text.en: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

text.fr: Ajoutez à votre main 2 Énergies Darkness attachées à ce Pokémon.
text.en: Put 2 Darkness Energy attached to this Pokémon into your hand.

text.fr: Cette attaque inflige 50 dégâts supplémentaires pour chaque Énergie Darkness supplémentaire attachée à ce Pokémon (en plus du coût de cette attaque). Vous ne pouvez pas ajouter plus de 100 dégâts de cette façon.
text.en: This attack does 50 more damage for each extra Darkness Energy attached to this Pokémon (in addition to this attack's cost). You can't add more than 100 damage in this way.

text.fr: Attachez une carte Énergie de base de votre pile de défausse à ce Pokémon.
text.en: Attach a basic Energy card from your discard pile to this Pokémon.

text.fr: Choisissez l'une des attaques du Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire et utilisez-la en tant que cette attaque.
text.en: Choose 1 of your opponent's Active Pokémon's attacks and use it as this attack.

text.fr: Cette attaque inflige 30 dégâts supplémentaires pour chaque carte Récompense que votre adversaire a récupérée.
text.en: This attack does 30 more damage for each Prize card your opponent has taken.

text.fr: Vous pouvez attacher une carte Énergie Darkness de votre main à l'un de vos Pokémon de Banc.
text.en: You may attach a Darkness Energy card from your hand to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

text.fr: Si le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire est un Pokémon-VMAX, cette attaque inflige 120 dégâts supplémentaires.
text.en: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Pokémon VMAX, this attack does 120 more damage.

text.fr: Cette attaque inflige 30 dégâts pour chacun de vos Pokémon Darkness en jeu.
text.en: This attack does 30 damage for each of your Darkness Pokémon in play.
